phases.name: L0 Navigation shell + module registry (the living module surface)
L1 Root money + classification nomenclatures + generic-CRUD framework
L2 Own legal entities (OwnPJ) + money locations + exchange rates
L4 Parts catalog (Generic/Specific) + production nomenclatures + Warehouse
L5 Vehicle + foundation-engine re-verify + documents-lifecycle REST API
L6 Inventory & procurement OPERATIONS surface (UI + lifecycle verbs)
L7 Service-orders spine: Cont de plata (quote) editor + ZN
L8 Treasury & payments OPERATIONS (payments, allocation, conformity)
L9 Config / users / rights management UI (last module)
